mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (content, category, difficulty, related_stacks, answer_keywords) VALUES (#{content}, #{category}, #{difficulty}, #{relatedStacks}, #{answerKeywords})
mapper.select: SELECT id, content, category, difficulty, related_stacks, answer_keywords, created_at FROM question ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, content, category, difficulty, related_stacks, answer_keywords, created_at FROM question WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY created_at DESC
